message:
feat(pages,storage,ui): expand pages subsystem with config input, encryption, export improvements, and storage query expansion

Pages subsystem:
- Expand config_input page with additional validation and input handling
- Expand encrypt page with improved key derivation and error reporting
- Refactor export page with streamlined pipeline and error propagation
- Expand key_management page with additional key operations
- Add new page module registrations
- Expand secret_scan with additional pattern matching and reporting

Storage:
- Major SQLite storage expansion (~160 lines) with additional query
  methods, metadata operations, and migration path improvements

UI:
- Expand app state management with additional view transitions and
  page navigation handling

Tests:
- Expand secret_scan tests with additional pattern coverage
- Minor test adjustments across e2e_pages, pages_error_handling,
  pages_master, and pages_pipeline test suites

Other:
- Pages perf bundle minor adjustment
- Core lib refinements for page routing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
